title: The glass backbone: Why the Army's logistics will break in the next war
summary: 文章分析美国陆军后勤系统脆弱性，指出在下一场战争中可能崩溃。
translated_summary: The article analyzes the fragility of the U.S. Army's logistics system, arguing it will likely break in the next war due to over-reliance on centralized supply chains and vulnerability to modern threats.
